branch_metadata.branch_rationale: Gravity / black-hole observable; matter-side per Einstein-eq source coupling

description: Binary defect inspiral. A pair of relational defects radiates gravitational waves under the standard Peters formula P = (32/5) eta^2 (M/d)^5; the inspiral time tau = (5/256) d^4 / (eta M^3) and the chirp mass M_c = (M1 M2)^{3/5}/(M1+M2)^{1/5} follow in lattice units (lu). The waveform structure (inspiral-merger-ringdown) is identical in functional form to the GR result; only the chirp mass and symmetric mass ratio differ from astrophysical mergers. Distilled from outputs_black_hole_thermo/bht07_merger_gw_signal.json and outputs_theory_closure/c1_schwarzschild_defect.json (scd05.binary_defect).
waveform_universal: Defect-merger waveform has the same functional form as the GR inspiral-merger-ringdown; only M_chirp and eta differ.
